_meta.description: POST-FIX PRS demo state. Demo END state after Option X rule activation and Doctor recommendations applied. Composite is computed from the 6 in-scope Engagement-measured dimensions (3 existing + 3 new). BRUID match rate and Rule Conflicts are Discovery dimensions that are OUT OF SCOPE (Discovery not enabled for this hackathon sandbox; 90-day roadmap) and EXCLUDED from the composite.

dimensions.raw_label: Not in scope — Discovery is not enabled for this hackathon sandbox (excluded from the composite)
dimensions.change_driver: Out of scope — Discovery not enabled for this sandbox; BRUID persistence is a 90-day roadmap item
dimensions.scope_note: Infrastructure scope — Discovery enablement is on the 90-day roadmap, not this demo.

dimensions.raw_label: 68% of sessions now assigned to a named AutoSegment
dimensions.change_driver: 3 manual segments created in Engagement + boost rules activated in Discovery
No direct change — boosted reactivation lift

dimensions.raw_label: Not in scope — Discovery is not enabled for this hackathon sandbox (excluded from the composite)
dimensions.change_driver: Out of scope — Discovery rule conflict analysis not enabled for this sandbox
dimensions.scope_note: Infrastructure scope — Discovery enablement is on the 90-day roadmap, not this demo.

dimensions.raw_label: 80% — A/B tests configured for segment-scoped boost rules
dimensions.change_driver: A/B tests set up to measure impact of the 3 newly activated boost rules

dimensions.raw_label: 3 segmentations × ≥2 conditions each, all 3 exposed to Discovery merchandising
dimensions.change_driver: Persona segments rebuilt with multi-condition filters (behavioural + recency + value) and exposed to Discovery

dimensions.raw_label: 60% — email capture and registration prompts lifted enriched profiles from 20% to 60%
dimensions.change_driver: Newsletter capture + checkout email-required + post-purchase profile prompts

dimensions.raw_label: 75% — avg 7.5 distinct event types per 90d-active user after instrumenting search, wishlist, and survey events
dimensions.change_driver: Search, wishlist_add, and survey events instrumented site-wide; cart_update and view_category broadened

score_verification.in_scope_dims: autosegment 16 + signal_freshness 14 + ab_test_coverage 16 + segment_definition_quality 17 + profile_completeness 12 + behavioral_signal_richness 15 = 90 of 120 available points (6 Engagement MCP dimensions)
score_verification.excluded_out_of_scope: bruid_match_rate (8/20) and rule_conflicts (16/20) are Discovery dimensions, out of scope (Discovery not enabled), and are NOT counted.
